title: feat(web): add workspace theme skins
body:
## Summary

- add the light-mode `Terracotta Note / čµ¤é™¶ćš–ç¬ş` and `Indigo Focus / éť›č“ťä¸“ćł¨` workspace skins, with persistence and toggle-back to the original UI
- extend semantic skin styling across navigation, settings, new chat, active chat/composer, AI Specialists Hub, and Schedule
- keep dark/system appearance independent by disabling skin selection outside light mode
- improve local mock preview support, agent avatars, WebSocket handshake, and hire-button behavior

## Validation

- `bash scripts/verify-changed.sh`
- focused web validation: 37 test files / 692 tests passed, TypeScript and ESLint passed
- `@zooclaw/chat-ui`: TypeScript, ESLint, and 30 test files / 293 tests passed

## Notes

- merged the latest `origin/main` before final validation
- the focused web lint reports one pre-existing accessibility warning in `LandingStartupOverlay.tsx`; there are no lint errors
